author: Frederic Nausea
title: Expositio missae
remarks: Comments the Mass of septuagesima, beginning with defense of the Eucharist. He was at the Council of Trent. In the Acts of the Council Nausea is praised for his knowledge, his virtues, and his ecclesiastical convictions (Augustin Theiner, Acta genuina Conc. Trid., I, Zagreb, 1874, 652).
